query: SELECT sp.competenciaName, sp.mediaAvaliacoesRespondidas, sp.mediaAvaliacoesFinais, sp.progressoTotal, sp.aulasDisponiveis, sp.aulasConcluidas FROM student_performance sp WHERE sp.userName LIKE '%Joseane%' LIMIT 20;
